plugins.name: Feeds
plugins.summary: Bluesky and X timelines on your glasses.
plugins.description: Read your social feeds on the HUD. Bluesky needs no account; X connects through an in-app sign-in. Threads, images, and swipe navigation, rendered as structured cards.
plugins.author: Anezium

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About

Read your social feeds on the HUD. Bluesky needs no account; X connects through an in-app sign-in. Threads, images, and swipe navigation, rendered as structured cards.

releases.notes:
- Android 11 support: the plugin now installs on Android 11 (API 30) phones.

### Artifact

- The app icon in Android settings and installer dialogs is now the plugin's own glyph on the Nexus dark background (adaptive icon), instead of a washed-out or generic mark.

### Artifact

- Bluesky and X timelines on the HUD (X via account session or WebView

- SHA-256: `e41a56bb156ea6ee73083101080d318fee29a945fd04613b211032e1346e38bb`

plugins.name: Lens
plugins.description: Point the glasses camera at text and read it translated on the HUD. Freeze a frame for a clean pass, or keep live translation running. Recognised text is sent for translation; images stay on device.
plugins.author: Anezium

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About

Point the glasses camera at text and read it translated on the HUD. Freeze a frame for a clean pass, or keep live translation running. Recognised text is sent for translation; images stay on device.

releases.notes:
- Android 11 support: the plugin now installs on Android 11 (API 30) phones. Declares ACCESS_COARSE_LOCATION alongside FINE for the Wi-Fi Direct link.

### Artifact

- File: `lens-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `f281a257ad4522ff725bf01413f2919b8ca8841adfff95b54f68e25e5cc5f7a2`

- Greek is now available as a translation target language.

### Artifact

- File: `lens-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `8b3c3be4e2872aa12080663ace8a5ca2abf1721d95e2ae8d0ceb050be3172511`

- Lens now works even when the phone's Wi-Fi is off: the phone hosts the camera link itself and the glasses join it automatically, no setting to toggle by hand.
- Recovers after a plugin update mid-session instead of requiring a hub restart.
- Camera rotation falls back to a software path instead of tearing the stream down on a hardware mismatch.
- The live overlay keeps its adaptive text layout in more cases instead of silently downgrading.
- The video decoder reconfigures without a brief stutter in the live feed.

### Artifact

- File: `lens-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `041eb1b6335f1ae64c546f38d45a9c7a648406eb46e547fb77b2d7eab51c01af`

- The app icon in Android settings and installer dialogs is now the plugin's own glyph on the Nexus dark background (adaptive icon), instead of a washed-out or generic mark.

### Artifact

- File: `lens-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `07b624916f7f1ba969f991b05581b1813ed05c0ce422f451cf12c97229d76000`

- API-key fields are now full-height inputs instead of a thin line.


### Artifact

- File: `lens-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `b29fc5bb15ef14ab0f6c84f82738f6d402617aae9b701c361456da8f64785883`

- Settings polish: larger, clearer API-key fields that read as real inputs, and a
  version label that tracks the installed build.


### Artifact

- File: `lens-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `2bd46a7943430a40882f12f8bd9d00eb2f3abdc0e3c8a721fa87f6a230333b4d`

- Ship an arm64-only APK, dropping the duplicated 32-bit and x86 copies of the
  ML Kit native libraries. Cuts the download from ~120 MB to ~47 MB with no change
  in behaviour: all OCR scripts stay bundled, offline, and instant.


### Artifact

- File: `lens-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `16815e3bb1d3da3f604b8b7523e5e15c5eef95f632c29933fedfc32cd3ed80b9`

- Camera platform: generic `camera` capability with the phone-side OCR pipeline
  over an app-owned Wi-Fi Direct link (freeze and live translation).
- Cold-link reliability: discovery-primed joins, identity-aware watchdogs, and
  group-owner protection so a healthy join is never torn down by recovery.
- Live overlay reconciliation, adaptive OCR cadence, and multi-script frozen results.


### Artifact

- File: `lens-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `b6bb9f81e5af6589d12a4bd55af6bd1a2926bb01106a83e8ec6e7cb3de77b6db`

plugins.name: Lume
plugins.summary: Glanceable RSVP speed-reading on the HUD.
plugins.description: Read PDFs, TXT files and shared text one word at a time on the glasses, streamed from your phone. Adaptive pacing, adjustable speed, pause and sentence stepping, and per-document progress. Manage your library on the phone; read hands-free with the R08 ring.
plugins.author: beyondlevi

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About

Lume turns Rokid glasses into a wearable speed reader. It uses RSVP (Rapid Serial Visual Presentation): text flows one word at a time at a fixed point in your field of view, so your eyes never travel across a line.

- Import PDF/TXT, paste text, or share into Lume from any app (extraction stays on-device).
- Adaptive pacing: long words, clause/sentence endings and paragraph breaks hold longer.
- Adjustable speed (150-700 wpm), pause, and sentence stepping, all on the R08 ring.
- Per-document reading progress; resume where you left off.

Fully operable by the R08 Access Bridge one-axis ring: move to select, tap to open/play/pause, back to exit.

releases.notes:
- Icon: declare both the built-in ICON (bookmark, rendered natively on the glasses) and the phone-side ICON_DRAWABLE glyph. v1.0.5 declared only the drawable, which never reaches the glasses launcher.

### Artifact

- File: `lume-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `f7e526ee6ac1089572242cf4b4dc976f3167ebccd2d99434bd78ea8f62d7c8ef`

- Glasses HUD icon now uses Lume's own RSVP glyph, matching the Android app icon.
- PDF import bounded (30 MB / 800 pages) with an out-of-memory guard.

### Artifact

- File: `lume-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `495dd82cedba7724b4aa666fd172911eb2faa9229cfd3bf4c6564565ea42aa1e`

- Settings header now reads the real versionName from the package manager (no version drift).
- Launcher and monochrome app icon now use Lume's own RSVP glyph everywhere.

### Artifact

- File: `lume-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `603b219dca69adced82b4ba981a4c289c8480f24b6797bcfc6e3859ab8099e4f`

- First Nexus Store release of the Lume RSVP reader.
- Reading streams as a CXR-safe sliding buffer, so documents of any length read even without the SPP data plane.
- Documents open paused; a tap starts playback. The display stays awake while reading.
- Phone library: import PDF/TXT, paste, share target, default speed, English/Portugues, per-document progress, remove.

### Artifact

- File: `lume-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `f250d8a33353923316abe1ab3f4bf06f235cb650086b45c6b9833212c47ac5ca`

plugins.name: Lyrics
plugins.description: Synced lyrics that follow whatever is playing on your phone. Spotify sign-in for synced lines, with LrcLib and Netease fallbacks. Opens itself when a track starts, if you let it.
plugins.author: Anezium

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About

Synced lyrics that follow whatever is playing on your phone. Spotify sign-in for synced lines, with LrcLib and Netease fallbacks. Opens itself when a track starts, if you let it.

releases.notes:
- Android 11 support: the plugin now installs on Android 11 (API 30) phones.

### Artifact

- File: `lyrics-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `695a61c23a101c1fba532a1ca639e71e42700e7f4ec6762a78f1dbc61aadeb28`

- The app icon in Android settings and installer dialogs is now the plugin's own glyph on the Nexus dark background (adaptive icon), instead of a washed-out or generic mark.

### Artifact

- File: `lyrics-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `26e0fdfa2b51653130ec201e62230e7a28d8146773ca88061d8f3ab5f4736d49`

- First release as a headless plugin APK (previously an in-hub built-in).
- Time-synced lyrics on the HUD via the SDK timed-lines surface.
- Providers: Spotify synced lyrics (in-app sign-in), Musixmatch (optional),
  LrcLib, Netease.
- Auto-open on playback changes, toggleable in settings.
- Own notification listener ("Nexus Lyrics") and kit settings screen with
  notification-access onboarding and uninstall.

### Artifact

- File: `lyrics-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `53ba1d551c73fe9af3bf6c731a765b48331f804199479614c5c1e75702d21e94`

plugins.name: Media Deck
plugins.summary: Now playing and transport controls on the HUD.
plugins.description: Whatever plays on your phone shows on the glasses: title, artist, artwork, and progress. Tap to play or pause, swipe to skip. Audio never passes through Nexus.
plugins.author: Anezium

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About

Whatever plays on your phone shows on the glasses: title, artist, artwork, and progress. Tap to play or pause, swipe to skip. Audio never passes through Nexus.

plugins.name: Shopping List
plugins.summary: A shopping list on your glasses, checked off with the R08 ring.
plugins.description: See your shopping list on the glasses HUD as a card and tick items off with the R08 ring. Add or remove items on the phone, or paste a whole list from another app and each line becomes an item.
plugins.author: Volund

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About

A headless Rokid Nexus plugin that shows your shopping list on the glasses HUD as a card. Walk the list with the R08 ring: move the cursor, tap to check an item off, back to close. Manage the list on the phone â€” add, remove, clear checked, or paste a multi-line list from another app to import every line at once.

releases.notes:
- Declares the built-in `ICON` key `cart` so the cart glyph also renders on the glasses HUD; keeps `ICON_DRAWABLE` as a fallback.

### Artifact

- File: `shoplist-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `8c9eeafbfe722012c10ec1aebdce8e309de35c7e1ac3a0e10ec3a65b45da4f77`

- Settings header now reads the real versionName from the package manager (no more version drift).
- Launcher and monochrome app icon now use the plugin's own cart glyph everywhere.

### Artifact

- File: `shoplist-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `6677150f9e23da5e45303317b881ee9b6e49ede3d3658af96449b1425adc5bb7`

- HUD card surface listing items, navigable by the R08 ring (move / check / back).
- Phone-side manager: add, remove, clear checked, and multi-line paste import (one item per line).
- Pure, unit-tested state machine and paste parser.

### Artifact

- File: `shoplist-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `e56b8be614f4e8e8fdf1571819e1daca50aaa342ab35f6a9c758caeacf7976be`

plugins.name: Transit
plugins.summary: Nearby departures and saved stops on the HUD.
plugins.description: Live public-transport departures for the stops you care about. Save favourites, search for a stop, and glance at the next departures without reaching for your phone.
plugins.author: Anezium

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
## About

Live public-transport departures for the stops you care about. Save favourites, search for a stop, and glance at the next departures without reaching for your phone.

releases.notes:
- Android 11 support: the plugin now installs on Android 11 (API 30) phones.

### Artifact

- File: `transit-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `4fa47174227b52b3ae82dcdeb5f63594763038b4519fc407a220dc2027cc0a4e`

- The app icon in Android settings and installer dialogs is now the plugin's own glyph on the Nexus dark background (adaptive icon), instead of a washed-out or generic mark.

### Artifact

- File: `transit-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `42f168c109a6f20e04c217f8b7d513b5bb38548d98ebf81a2c7cbaea6df0b671`

- Near Me now takes a single fresh location fix (fused, GPS, then network) instead of falling back to stale last-known positions, and releases the location foreground service right after the fix.
- Location setup is a guided two-step flow in the plugin settings: grant precise location, then allow background access ("Allow all the time") so Near Me works while the phone stays in your pocket.
- Clearer HUD messages when a location permission is still missing.
- Reworked Near Me and favourites refresh loops with lifecycle test coverage.


### Artifact

- File: `transit-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `e555ecfa2297ed9d9a44de64ab7e8c8f423e40c406ec3cc1e590e17562110f19`

- First release as a headless plugin APK (previously an in-hub built-in).
- Near Me live departures with a self-managed location foreground service.
- Favourite stops board; one-shot migration of favourites from the old
  built-in on first approval.
- Kit settings screen with permission handling, stop search, favourites,
  and uninstall.

### Artifact

- File: `transit-phone-release.apk`
- SHA-256: `08fac400501a280205d0fe8c7b8276e16d19cbf624b3798be70c3ca3d04f95c2`
